data.name: Gachi-Natsu/ガチムチでドスケベな家庭教師のお兄さんと過ごす夏
data.detailed_description:
大綱

「我在那個炎炎夏日與他相遇了。」

響涼太在考大學時失利，過著準備重考的生活。
此時家教老師劍崎敦出現在他的面前。

敦將在暑假期間，住在涼太家裡隨時隨地指導他念書。
涼太對於突如其來的發展感到震驚的同時，
也因期待在這段和大肌肌猛男帥哥的同居生活中，可能會發生令人開心的事而暗自雀躍。

但是！敦是最喜歡肉棒、精力ＭＡＸ的大色胚家教老師！
每天都有超級色色的事情發生！

這個夏天到底會如何發展呢！？

看點

Wasp所繪製的充滿魅力的角色！
由實力派繪師――Wasp擔任本作的角色設計及原畫！
能夠感受到溫度的肌肉和色色的繪圖！敬請享受細節滿滿的色色場景。

完全沒有麻煩的系統！
大量的選項，各個結局迥然不同？特殊的通關條件？完全沒有這些要素！
本視覺小說遊戲旨在讓大家輕鬆享受色色場景及故事。

data.short_description: 「我想做的事，是什麼來著？」 大肌肌猛男帥哥家教老師小哥來到了在大學入學考試時失利的少年的身邊。然而，這個家教老師卻是個不得了的大色胚！充滿色色的暑假將展開序幕！大肌肌猛男的色情小說第一彈就此登場！
data.supported_languages:
英文, 繁體中文, 日文*, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Requires 64-bit processor and operating system
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Gachi-Natsu/ガチムチでドスケベな家庭教師のお兄さんと過ごす夏
data.detailed_description:
Introduction

It was a sweltering hot day when I met that man.

Ryota Hibiki failed the university entrance exam and is trying again.
His tutor, Atsushi Kenzaki, appears before him.

Atsushi says he will live at Ryota’s house during the summer vacation and teach him how to study.
Although surprised at this sudden turn of events, living together with a good-looking, stocky guy….
Ryota is excited that there may be a little joy in his life.

But! Atsushi was a cock-loving, energetic, maximalist, and dirty tutor!
Erotic things happen all the time!

What the hell is going to happen this summer!?

Point

Charming characters by Wasp!
The character design and original drawings for this work are by the talented illustrator Wasp!

The description of muscles and eroticism that even the temperature can be felt!
Please enjoy the erotic scenes that have been carefully selected.

No complicated system at all!
A branching story with many choices? A full-blown challenge? There are no such elements!

Enjoy the eroticism and story in a casual way! is the concept of this simple, one-way novel game.

data.short_description: It was a sweltering hot day when I met him. During summer vacation, a young man who had failed his university entrance exam received a tutor to help him with his studies. He started living together with a handsome, muscular man, but! He is a cock-loving, energetic, and dirty tutor!
